channel.title: math.KT updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: math.KT updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: On formality of diagrams of Eilenberg-MacLane spaces
item.description: arXiv:2604.22435v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In this paper, we establish formality (over $\mathbb{Q}$) for diagrams of Eilenberg-MacLane spaces of any height $n\geq 1$. This implies spectral sequence (over $\mathbb{Q}$) collapse at page $2$ for any diagram of EML spaces over any small category. We prove by functor calculus argument that formality does not hold over any fixed commutative ring $\mathbf{k}$ not containing $\mathbb{Q}$, where the category of diagrams is over the category generated by finite direct sums of a cyclic group.
item.dc:creator: Grigory Solomadin, Antoine Touz\'e

item.title: Analytic spectral flow formula for unitaries and Levinson's theorem
item.description: arXiv:2604.22451v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We prove an integral formula for the spectral flow of differentiable loops of unitaries of the form ${\rm Id}+$Schatten. Our formula is in terms of a regularised winding number, expressed in terms of exact differential forms, and we show how the formula extends to non-closed paths. Applying these ideas to the scattering operator of Schr\"{o}dinger scattering systems yields explicit formulae for the number of bound states, possibly modified by the presence of resonances, of the system in terms of the potential. We finish by briefly considering the paths of unbounded operators obtained from unitary loops via the Cayley transform. These include cases of moving domain as well as paths with non-constant Hilbert space.
item.dc:creator: A. Alexander, A. Carey, G. Levitina, A. Rennie
